decisions.decision: Filter is render-only in NavigationBar (railDocs); StepTab keeps its action-step logic untouched
decisions.why: coreDocs must keep carrying action steps for footer/state logic, and StepTab stays a general component whose action branches simply never fire from the rail
decisions.rejected: stripping sourceDoc/action handling out of StepTab, which would widen the diff beyond the spec approach
